regeneration.notes: Sage optional. LA/CEX live generators are complete for the declared fragment when sage is installed; rational equality remains scaffold/best-effort (placeholder). Without Sage, adapter runs fixture mode (JSON-RPC up; live compute unavailable). No committed Sage evidence bundles yet.

knownDefects: Live Sage rational compute is scaffold/best-effort (zero-numerator identities); CI defaults to fixture mode when sage is not installed.
No offline_fixtures_passing Sage bundles under evidence/; dual-backend rational evidence today is SymPy + Mathematica fixtures only.
LA/CEX live_generator_complete requires sage executable; public CI without Sage stays fixture/unavailable (same honesty pattern as Mathematica without Wolfram).
